title: Schemas / XanaNode Property Registry v0.1.0
summary: A canonical schema or registry artifact published as XanaNode Property Registry v0.1.0.
content:
{
  "$schema": "https://xananode.org/schemas/property-registry.schema.json",
  "id": "xananode.core:property-registry",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Canonical common properties for open-ended substrate node adjectives.",
  "property_registry": [
    {
      "id": "birth_date",
      "label": "Birth date",
      "description": "Calendar date on which a person, organization, project, or entity began.",
      "category": "time",
      "aliases": [
        "born",
        "date_of_birth",
        "founded_date"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "organization",
        "project"
      ],
      "unit_system": "ISO-8601",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "format": "date"
      },
      "examples": [
        "1955-02-24"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "geo_coordinates",
      "label": "Geographic coordinates",
      "description": "WGS84 latitude and longitude coordinates for a place or geographically located entity.",
      "category": "space",
      "aliases": [
        "coordinates",
        "lat_lon",
        "location"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "place",
        "event",
        "organization",
        "source",
        "media"
      ],
      "unit_system": "WGS84",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "latitude",
          "longitude"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "latitude": {
            "type": "number",
            "minimum": -90,
            "maximum": 90
          },
          "longitude": {
            "type": "number",
            "minimum": -180,
            "maximum": 180
          },
          "altitude_m": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "crs": {
            "type": "string",
            "const": "WGS84"
          }
        }
      },
      "examples": [
        {
          "latitude": 37.33182,
          "longitude": -122.03118,
          "crs": "WGS84"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "currency_value",
      "label": "Currency value",
      "description": "A monetary amount with an ISO 4217 currency code.",
      "category": "money",
      "aliases": [
        "price",
        "cost",
        "market_value",
        "amount_money"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "claim",
        "observation",
        "source",
        "project"
      ],
      "unit_system": "ISO-4217",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "amount",
          "currency"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "amount": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "currency": {
            "type": "string",
            "pattern": "^[A-Z]{3}$"
          },
          "as_of": {
            "type": "string",
            "format": "date-time"
          }
        }
      },
      "examples": [
        {
          "amount": 199.99,
          "currency": "USD",
          "as_of": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "measurement_si",
      "label": "SI measurement",
      "description": "A quantified physical or conceptual measurement expressed in SI-compatible units.",
      "category": "quantity",
      "aliases": [
        "measurement",
        "quantity",
        "metric_value"
      ],
      "unit_system": "SI",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "value",
          "unit"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "value": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "unit": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "quantity_kind": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "uncertainty": {
            "type": "number"
          }
        }
      },
      "examples": [
        {
          "value": 1.82,
          "unit": "m",
          "quantity_kind": "height"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "external_identifier",
      "label": "External identifier",
      "description": "A typed identifier from an external authority or registry.",
      "category": "reference",
      "aliases": [
        "wikidata_id",
        "doi",
        "orcid",
        "authority_id"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "authority",
          "value"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "authority": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "value": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "url": {
            "type": "string",
            "format": "uri"
          }
        }
      },
      "examples": [
        {
          "authority": "wikidata",
          "value": "Q19837",
          "url": "https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q19837"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "uncertainty_level",
      "label": "Uncertainty level",
      "category": "epistemology",
      "description": "A normalized level describing how uncertain a node, relationship, answer, or interpretation remains.",
      "aliases": [
        "certainty_level",
        "unknown_level",
        "confidence_gap"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "relationship",
        "response"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "unknown",
          "low",
          "medium",
          "high",
          "unresolved"
        ]
      },
      "examples": [
        "high"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "review_status",
      "label": "Review status",
      "category": "workflow",
      "description": "The current review state for a node, relationship, pack, claim, or suggested merge.",
      "aliases": [
        "validation_status",
        "curation_status"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "relationship",
        "source"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "draft",
          "needs_review",
          "under_review",
          "approved",
          "rejected",
          "deprecated"
        ]
      },
      "examples": [
        "needs_review"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "research_priority",
      "label": "Research priority",
      "category": "attention",
      "description": "A priority signal for deciding which inquiry, problem, or knowledge gap deserves attention first.",
      "aliases": [
        "priority",
        "attention_priority"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "question",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "claim",
        "hypothesis"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "integer",
        "minimum": 1,
        "maximum": 5
      },
      "examples": [
        5
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "evidence_strength",
      "label": "Evidence strength",
      "category": "epistemology",
      "description": "A compact assessment of the strength of evidence available for a claim, hypothesis, answer, or relationship.",
      "aliases": [
        "support_strength",
        "evidence_quality"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "claim",
        "hypothesis",
        "response",
        "relationship"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "none",
          "weak",
          "moderate",
          "strong",
          "decisive",
          "contested"
        ]
      },
      "examples": [
        "moderate"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "communication_model",
      "label": "Communication model",
      "category": "communication",
      "description": "The participant topology of a communication.",
      "aliases": [
        "communication_topology",
        "topology"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "communication",
        "event",
        "publication",
        "source"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "one_to_one",
          "one_to_many",
          "many_to_one",
          "many_to_many"
        ]
      },
      "examples": [
        "many_to_many"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "communication_pattern",
      "label": "Communication pattern",
      "category": "communication",
      "description": "The semantic pattern of a communication beyond participant count.",
      "aliases": [
        "interaction_pattern",
        "discourse_pattern"
      ],
      "applies_to": [
        "communication",
        "event",
        "publication",
        "source"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": [
          "dialogue",
          "broadcast",
          "collection",
          "coordination",
          "negotiation",
          "debate",
          "consensus",
          "instruction",
          "query_response",
          "publication"
        ]
      },
      "examples": [
        "query_response"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "title",
      "label": "Title",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "The primary human-readable title for a node.",
      "aliases": ["name", "headline"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": [
        "Douglas Adams"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "summary",
      "label": "Summary",
      "category": "communication",
      "description": "A short human sentence that explains why a node exists and what it means.",
      "aliases": ["abstract", "description_short"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": [
        "Writer and technologist who helped popularize hypertext ideas."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "content",
      "label": "Content",
      "category": "communication",
      "description": "The authored prose, note text, or long-form body content for a node.",
      "aliases": ["body", "authored_text", "markdown"],
      "applies_to": [
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": [
        "Begin with a practical question, then connect it to sources, claims, and unanswered gaps."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "subtype",
      "label": "Subtype",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "The primary narrower classification inside a node's main type.",
      "aliases": ["primary_subtype"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": [
        "writer"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "subtypes",
      "label": "Subtypes",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "Additional narrower classifications that stay attached to the same node without changing its primary type.",
      "aliases": ["additional_subtypes"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "uniqueItems": true
      },
      "examples": [
        ["writer", "researcher"]
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "facets",
      "label": "Facets",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "Secondary roles that help a node behave like more than one kind of thing without duplicating it.",
      "aliases": ["secondary_roles"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "uniqueItems": true
      },
      "examples": [
        ["source", "claim"]
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "sharing",
      "label": "Sharing scope",
      "category": "workflow",
      "description": "The export and sharing intent for a node, including whether it should stay local or ship with a substrate.",
      "aliases": ["sharing_scope", "export_scope", "privacy_scope"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "claim",
        "question",
        "hypothesis",
        "problem",
        "knowledge_gap",
        "communication",
        "response",
        "source",
        "observation",
        "essay",
        "media",
        "event",
        "place",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "community",
        "relationship",
        "revision",
        "trail",
        "schema",
        "fragment"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": true,
        "properties": {
          "scope": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": ["public", "private", "restricted"]
          },
          "shareable": {
            "type": "boolean"
          }
        }
      },
      "examples": [
        {
          "scope": "private",
          "shareable": false
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "gender",
      "label": "Gender",
      "category": "identity",
      "description": "A gender value when it matters to the record or to kinship inference.",
      "aliases": ["sex_gender"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": ["female", "male", "nonbinary", "unknown"]
      },
      "examples": [
        "female"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "scientific_name",
      "label": "Scientific name",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "The formal biological or taxonomic name for an organism or taxon.",
      "aliases": ["latin_name", "taxonomic_name"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["Corvus brachyrhynchos"]
    },
    {
      "id": "common_name",
      "label": "Common name",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "A vernacular or everyday biological name for an organism or taxon.",
      "aliases": ["vernacular_name"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["American crow"]
    },
    {
      "id": "taxon_rank",
      "label": "Taxon rank",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "The taxonomic or classification rank represented by an organism node.",
      "aliases": ["rank"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": ["individual", "specimen", "species", "genus", "family", "order", "class", "phylum", "kingdom", "clade", "breed", "cultivar"]
      },
      "examples": ["species"]
    },
    {
      "id": "biological_sex",
      "label": "Biological sex",
      "category": "identity",
      "description": "The biological sex for an organism when it matters to lineage, reproduction, or description.",
      "aliases": ["sex"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": ["female", "male", "hermaphroditic", "asexual", "unknown"]
      },
      "examples": ["female"]
    },
    {
      "id": "life_stage",
      "label": "Life stage",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "A developmental or life-cycle stage for an organism or specimen.",
      "aliases": ["developmental_stage"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["juvenile"]
    },
    {
      "id": "habitat",
      "label": "Habitat",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "The environment, ecological niche, range, or habitat associated with an organism or taxon.",
      "aliases": ["ecology", "range"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["temperate urban woodland"]
    },
    {
      "id": "conservation_status",
      "label": "Conservation status",
      "category": "classification",
      "description": "A conservation or rarity status for an organism or taxon.",
      "aliases": ["iucn_status", "rarity_status"],
      "applies_to": ["organism"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["least_concern"]
    },
    {
      "id": "death_date",
      "label": "Death date",
      "category": "time",
      "description": "Calendar date on which a person or entity ended.",
      "aliases": ["died", "date_of_death", "closed_date"],
      "applies_to": ["person", "organization", "project"],
      "unit_system": "ISO-8601",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "format": "date"
      },
      "examples": ["2001-05-11"]
    },
    {
      "id": "nationality",
      "label": "Nationality",
      "category": "identity",
      "description": "A nationality or national affiliation when it helps identify or contextualize a person.",
      "aliases": ["citizenship", "national_affiliation"],
      "applies_to": ["person"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["British"]
    },
    {
      "id": "occupation",
      "label": "Occupation",
      "category": "identity",
      "description": "A short role label for a person's work or calling.",
      "aliases": ["profession", "role"],
      "applies_to": ["person"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["Writer"]
    },
    {
      "id": "aliases",
      "label": "Aliases",
      "category": "identity",
      "description": "Other names, spellings, handles, or variant titles for the same node.",
      "aliases": ["alternate_names", "aka"],
      "applies_to": [
        "person",
        "concept",
        "source",
        "organization",
        "project",
        "technology",
        "publication",
        "place",
        "media"
      ],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "uniqueItems": true
      },
      "examples": [
        ["H2G2", "The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy"]
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "author",
      "label": "Author",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "The credited human or organizational author of a source.",
      "aliases": ["creator_name", "byline"],
      "applies_to": ["source"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["Douglas Adams"]
    },
    {
      "id": "year",
      "label": "Year",
      "category": "time",
      "description": "A publication year or best-known year for a source.",
      "aliases": ["publication_year", "release_year"],
      "applies_to": ["source", "publication", "media"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["1979"]
    },
    {
      "id": "source_url",
      "label": "Source URL",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "The primary online location for a source, media item, or referenceable record.",
      "aliases": ["url", "canonical_url", "origin_url"],
      "applies_to": ["source", "media", "schema"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "format": "uri"
      },
      "examples": ["https://xananode.com/"]
    },
    {
      "id": "archive_url",
      "label": "Archive URL",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "A preserved or alternate online location for a source.",
      "aliases": ["snapshot_url", "mirror_url"],
      "applies_to": ["source", "media"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string",
        "format": "uri"
      },
      "examples": ["https://web.archive.org/web/20260101000000/https://example.com/"]
    },
    {
      "id": "license",
      "label": "License",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "The declared license for a source, media asset, schema, or code artifact.",
      "aliases": ["license_name"],
      "applies_to": ["source", "media", "schema", "project", "technology"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["CC-BY 4.0"]
    },
    {
      "id": "rights_status",
      "label": "Rights status",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "A compact statement of the reuse or ownership status for a source or asset.",
      "aliases": ["rights", "copyright_status"],
      "applies_to": ["source", "media", "schema", "project", "technology"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["external"]
    },
    {
      "id": "creator",
      "label": "Creator",
      "category": "reference",
      "description": "The credited creator of a media item or asset-backed record.",
      "aliases": ["artist", "photographer", "maker"],
      "applies_to": ["media", "source"],
      "unit_system": "none",
      "value_schema": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "examples": ["Michael Hughes"]
